judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly planned to filter repositories by language and license and then count qualifying commit messages, but its implementation constructed overly long IN lists that produced DuckDB parser errors (“unterminated quoted string”) and, after a partial chunking attempt, it stopped and returned an inability message instead of completing the aggregation.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving the Shell+Apache-2.0 repo list from metadata_database, the agent generated many batched count queries against artifacts_database.commits but executed only a few batches (all returned 0) and then prematurely returned 0 without aggregating across all repositories, resulting in an incorrect total.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent retrieved repo_names from metadata_database and then filtered artifacts_database.commits using a verbatim IN list containing mixed-case names (e.g., 'Nordstrom/al_agents', 'RobinUS2/presto'), but did not normalize case or ensure identifier alignment across databases, resulting in no matches and a count of 0 instead of the true total.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving the full list of Shell+Apache-2.0 repositories, the agent arbitrarily sliced it to the first 200 entries (call_FoeDuFl30C84fkXswp3fiXSZ) and only counted commits for that subset (call_Dr2smZRyCjeIxecRiXHM9Ikg), leading to an undercount of 0 instead of aggregating over all matching repositories.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
